Following Kenya’s health financing agreement with the USA, discussions have emerged around the management of medical research data. The Data Commissioner highlighted that the Office of the Data Commisioner provided advisory on addressing key gaps and ensuring the data is governed under Kenyan law. @ikassait @ntvkenya #DataPrivacyConference2026 #TrustTheData
